prompt: Use these as STYLE and CONTENT references. Create one single FEMININE ethereal figure framed from the WAIST UP (a closer, waist-up / torso shot — head, chest, shoulders, arms and torso down to the waist, NOT full body), front-facing, centered and larger in the frame. Keep the soft warm ETHEREAL look: a translucent figure of warm golden-white inner light with smoky wispy energy filaments radiating around it, on a dreamy soft TAN / warm-beige gradient background (NOT harsh white, NOT black), long-exposure dream feel, fine grain. Embed the anatomy: a glowing anatomical BRAIN at the top of the head, a luminous DNA double-helix running down the center of the chest and torso, and translucent botanical LEAVES and leaf-vein / nerve networks across the chest, shoulders and arms. Warm golden-tan palette, soft and ethereal, glow gently bleeding into the warm background. No text, no logos. 1:1 square, waist-up composition.
